text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! We've set you up with the moderator role. Please review the mod guidelines in #staff-info and say hi in #moderators-intro when you can.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! We've added you as a mentor. Please review the mentoring guidelines in #mentor-resources and introduce yourself in #mentors-lounge.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You're approved as an event helper. Check out the #events channel for upcoming activities and coordination details.
